sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58014" key="klu/dacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῠ´δ-αξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">splashing</tr_> in the stomach, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
